allow: Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u covid -pCovid123@ dmis -e "SHOW TABLES LIKE '%ocument%'; SHOW TABLES LIKE '%istor%';")
Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u covid -pCovid123@ dmis -e "SHOW TABLES;")

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u covid -pCovid123@ dmis -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS documents FROM DOCUMENT; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS histories FROM DOCUMENTHISTORY; SELECT historyType, completed, COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM DOCUMENTHISTORY WHERE retired=0 AND historyType='Letter_Copy_or_Forward' AND createdAt >= DATE_SUB\(NOW\(\), INTERVAL 30 DAY\) GROUP BY historyType, completed;")

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u covid -pCovid123@ dmis -e "SELECT historyType, completed, COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM DOCUMENTHISTORY WHERE retired=0 AND historyType IN \('Letter_Copy_or_Forward','Letter_Copy_or_Forward_Accepted'\) AND createdAt >= DATE_SUB\(NOW\(\), INTERVAL 30 DAY\) GROUP BY historyType, completed; SELECT 'distinct accepted forwards via new-record path' AS note; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS accepted_doc_count FROM \(SELECT DISTINCT document_id FROM DOCUMENTHISTORY WHERE historyType='Letter_Copy_or_Forward_Accepted' AND retired=0 AND createdAt >= DATE_SUB\(NOW\(\), INTERVAL 30 DAY\)\) t;")

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u covid -pCovid123@ dmis -e "SELECT id, document_id, completed, createdAt, completedAt, completedBy_id, toUser_id, toInstitution_id FROM DOCUMENTHISTORY WHERE historyType='Letter_Copy_or_Forward' AND completed=1 AND retired=0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 15;")

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u covid -pCovid123@ dmis -e "SELECT historyType, COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM DOCUMENTHISTORY WHERE retired=0 AND createdAt >= DATE_SUB\(NOW\(\), INTERVAL 30 DAY\) GROUP BY historyType ORDER BY n DESC;")

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u covid -pCovid123@ dmis -e "SELECT CASE WHEN toUser_id IS NULL THEN 'institution_only' ELSE 'user' END AS routed_to, completed, COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM DOCUMENTHISTORY WHERE historyType='Letter_Copy_or_Forward' AND retired=0 AND createdAt >= DATE_SUB\(NOW\(\), INTERVAL 30 DAY\) GROUP BY routed_to, completed ORDER BY routed_to, completed;")

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u covid -pCovid123@ dmis -e "SELECT toInstitution_id, COUNT\(*\) AS pending_n FROM DOCUMENTHISTORY WHERE historyType='Letter_Copy_or_Forward' AND retired=0 AND completed=0 AND createdAt >= DATE_SUB\(NOW\(\), INTERVAL 30 DAY\) GROUP BY toInstitution_id ORDER BY pending_n DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u covid -pCovid123@ dmis -e "SELECT id, name FROM INSTITUTION WHERE id IN \(1, 134593, 1325233, 1314316, 1319812\);")

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u covid -pCovid123@ dmis -e "SELECT id, name, username FROM WEBUSER WHERE username='buddhika' OR name LIKE '%uddhika%' LIMIT 5; SELECT 'forwards received by buddhika in 30d' AS note; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM DOCUMENTHISTORY h JOIN WEBUSER u ON u.id=h.completedBy_id WHERE h.historyType='Letter_Copy_or_Forward' AND h.completed=1 AND h.retired=0 AND h.createdAt >= DATE_SUB\(NOW\(\), INTERVAL 30 DAY\) AND u.username='buddhika';")
Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3307 -u covid -pCovid123@ dmis -e "DESCRIBE WEBUSER;")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\' -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'Payara|GlassFish' } | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime)
